---
title: "Events"
format: html
listing: 
  contents: 
   - "events/*.qmd"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  fields: [title, image, date, categories, title, subtitle]
  sort-ui: [title, date] # Agregar barra de orden
  filter-ui: [title, date] # Agregar barra de filtrado
---

::: callout-note
Aqui van los eventos como los Dias academicos y premios de mejor charla, etc
:::
